channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Palestinian-American kids find inspiration, and escape, on the soccer pitch
item.description: A dozen miles from the World Cup games at MetLife Stadium, Palestinian-American children use soccer as an escape from difficult realities.

item.title: These nuns spent a lifetime helping others. In their last years, who will help them?
item.description: Ugandan nuns who have served as teachers and health advocates now need care in their old age, but assistance is uncertain.

item.title: California man's case reveals shortcomings in DHS detention center oversight
item.description: Ricardo Parias was shot by federal officers during an ICE operation eight months ago. His lawyer says he still suffers, underscoring gaps in care.

item.title: Opinion: Algae blooms ignore political divisions
item.description: A $14 million renovation of the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool, championed by President Trump, is now struggling with persistent algae growth.
